     The Numbers Business Report

Immaculate (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,671,306Details
International Box Office $9,375,594
Worldwide Box Office $25,046,900
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $219,778
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $135,119
Total $354,897
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Cecilia is an American nun of devout faith, embarking on a new journey in a remote convent in the picturesque Italian countryside. Cecilia’s warm welcome quickly devolves into a nightmare as it becomes clear her new home harbors a sinister secret and unspeakable horrors.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,338,921 (34.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,354 opening theaters/2,362 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $16,571,955

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 22nd, 2024 (Wide) by Neon
International Releases: March 20th, 2024 (Limited), released as Immaculee (France)
March 21st, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
March 21st, 2024 (Limited), released as Immaculate (Дитя Дьявола) (Russia (CIS))
March 21st, 2024 (Limited), released as Immaculate (ΑΣΠΙΛΗ) (Greece)
March 21st, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: April 16th, 2024 by Neon
MPA Rating: R for strong and bloody violent content, grisly images, nudity and some language.
Running Time: 89 minutes
Film festival: South by Southwest Film Festival 2024
Filming location (city or town): Rome, Italy
Plot point: Christians, Monks and Nuns, Religious
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Needle Eye, Catapult Entertainment Group
Production Countries: Italy, United States
Languages: English
